scenarios.description: load() without systemProperties and parser returns multiple entries exercises B0→B2 with loop>0
scenarios.precondition: Mock DotenvParser.parse() returns a list of two entries
scenarios.expectedResult: DotenvImpl.entries() contains both parser entries plus system env entries
pseudocode: TEST TC10 load without systemProperties multiple-parser-entries
// Stub parser to return two file entries
List<DotenvEntry> entries = List.of(new DotenvEntry("K1","V1"), new DotenvEntry("K2","V2"));
Mock construction of DotenvParser so parse() returns entries

scenarios.description: load() with ignoreIfMissing and non-existent directory does not throw and yields only system env entries
scenarios.precondition: Directory path does not exist; throwIfMissing=false via ignoreIfMissing()
scenarios.expectedResult: No exception; entries() equals system environment entries only
pseudocode: TEST TC11 load ignoreIfMissing on missing directory

scenarios.description: load() throws DotenvException when throwIfMalformed=true and parser.parse() signals malformed data
pseudocode: TEST TC12 load throws on malformed file
Mock construction of DotenvParser so parse() throws new DotenvException("malformed");
